translations.### Day 4 東京鐵塔、明治神宮、Le Labo、龜有烏龍派出所、淺草雷門: ### Day 4 Tokyo Tower, Meiji Shrine, Le Labo, Kameari Udon Police Station, Asakusa Kaminarimon, Skytree
translations.### Day 5 國會議事堂、皇居、東京車站、回程\n\n: ### Day 5 National Diet Building, Imperial Palace, Tokyo Station, Return Trip
translations.#### 2023/05 京阪神 8 日自由行\n\n: #### 2023/05 8-Day Free Travel in Kyoto, Osaka, and Kobe
translations.#### 一樣用吃結束這一天\n\n: #### End the day the same way—with food
translations.#### 回飯店後依然是清酒泡麵點心三件組，結束這一日\n\n: #### After returning to the hotel, it was still the trio of sake, instant noodles, and snacks to end the day.
translations.#### 最後一晚的宵夜\n\n: #### Late-night snack on the last night
translations.#### 東京行的組合 — 三單男\n\n: #### The Tokyo Trip Group — Three Single Men

translations.(影片是後來才補拍的，有點亂ＸＤ)\n\n: (The video was shot later, a bit messy XD)
translations.**一早起來先悠閒的看一下機場風景：**\n\n: **Woke up early and leisurely enjoyed the airport scenery:**
translations.**另外最後還差點回不來，在東京車站買往成田機場的車票時不能刷卡，東湊西湊下才湊: **Also, we almost couldn't get back at the end. When buying the ticket to Narita Airport at Tokyo Station, card payment was not accepted, so we had to scrape together cash from here and there to pay.**
translations.**地點：就在第二航廈南側號5樓，下樓就是第二航廈 (走下來約 5 分鐘)**\: **Location: Just on the 5th floor of the south side of Terminal 2, going downstairs leads to Terminal 2 (about a 5-minute walk down)**
translations.- For insights on Japanese culture, plea:
- For insights on Japanese culture, please refer to the previous article "[[Travelogue] 2023 Keihanshin & 🇯🇵 First Landing](../76d66c2e34af/)".

- Japanese time notation uses a 30-hour system; for example, 25:00 means 1:00 AM, which is pretty cool.

- You really need to carry at least around 10,000 yen in cash to avoid situations where cards or Vias cards are not accepted.

- Thanks to my travel companions this time, Sean INFJ and James ISTJ, the planning masters; Sean took charge of deciding how to play Disney, which rides to go first, and which fast passes are more worthwhile.

translations.> (The video was shot later, a bit messy: > (The video was shot later, a bit messy XD)
translations.> **Also, we almost couldn't get back at: > **Also, we almost couldn't get back at the end. When buying the ticket to Narita Airport at Tokyo Station, card payment was not accepted, so we had to gather cash from various places to pay.**
translations.> After entering the park, we tried to d: > After entering the park, we tried to draw tickets for shows or entry but didn’t win any. Finally, we purchased front-row seats for the evening fireworks show "[Believe! ~Sea of Dreams~](https://www.tokyodisneyresort.jp/tc/tds/show/detail/967/){:target="_blank"}" (you can also watch from outside, as the show is in the harbor public area).
translations.> As for food, we ate randomly and felt: > As for food, we ate randomly and felt it might be better to bring our own meals from outside.
translations.> Because my Visa card was declined at a: > Because my Visa card was declined at a drugstore in Shinjuku, I had to pay over ¥10,000 in cash for cosmetics and medicine. I also wanted to use up all my cash in the end.
translations.> For information on Japan entry and oth: > For information on Japan entry and other insights, please refer to [**previous article**](../76d66c2e34af/) .
translations.> Fortunately, the rain stopped after no: > Fortunately, the rain stopped after noon!! I'm not a fan of rain!!
translations.> Fortunately, we had booked the night b: > Fortunately, we had booked the night before. When other travelers tried to check in on-site, there were no rooms left.
translations.> Here I made a mistake: **you should ne: > Here I made a mistake: **you should never book three tickets under one person's name**. Each person should buy their own ticket because credit card purchases include travel insurance.
translations.> Here we bought the Express Pass.\n\n: > Here we bought the Express Pass.
translations.> I should have just stayed in the capsu: > I should have just stayed in the capsule hotel until 7 AM before coming down!
translations.> If time allows, spend two days on land: > If time allows, spend two days on land and sea. The sea park doesn't have the Fantasy Castle or land parades QQ.
translations.> If you don't buy tickets in advance, t: > If you don't purchase tickets in advance, there will be no available entry slots on-site.
translations.> KKday [*【Tokyo Kimono Rental Recommend: > KKday [*【Tokyo Kimono Rental Recommendation!】Asakusa, Tokyo, Japan | Kimono Experience (Asakusa's First Japanese Magazine Style Kimono Shop, Only a 3-Minute Walk from Kaminarimon)*](https://www.kkday.com/zh-tw/product/140384?cid=19365&ud1=9da2c51fa4f2){:target="_blank"}
translations.> Kobe beef steak was super delicious, j: > Kobe beef steak was super delicious, juicy, and tender inside, with no beefy smell 🤩; the hamburger steak was also good but a bit greasier.
translations.> Later, I found that flying from Songsh: > Later, I found that flying from Songshan to Haneda wasn't much more expensive and was more convenient. Orz.
translations.> No eating or drinking is allowed in th: > No eating or drinking is allowed in the room. Each guest receives a tea bag at check-in, and the front desk can assist with brewing. You can sit at the bar near the entrance to drink. Filling out a membership form on-site grants a free towel.
translations.> So many cute souvenirs, gotta control: > So many cute souvenirs, gotta control my hands (hand chopping)!
translations.> The whole day at Disney felt very imme: > The whole day at Disney felt very immersive. The attractions are not just rides but aim to let visitors fully engage with the characters and settings. Although it's less thrilling than Universal, it's definitely very fun. Be sure to watch the fireworks show at night!
translations.> When transferring to the Narita Expres: > When transferring to the Narita Express, I initially made a silly mistake by tapping my Suica card to enter the station. However, the entire train requires reserved seats, so I had to exit the station, buy a ticket, and enter again (later I found out you can actually buy tickets directly from the platform machines inside the station).
translations.> [*KKday Tokyo Skytree Observatory Tick: > [*KKday Tokyo Skytree Observatory Ticket / Enjoy Package Tokyo Subway 24-hour Ticket / Sumida Aquarium*](https://www.kkday.com/zh-tw/product/10759-tokyo-skytree-observatory-advance-ticket-japan?cid=19365&ud1=9da2c51fa4f2){:target="_blank"}
translations.> [If this article is helpful to you, pl: > [If this article is helpful to you, please consider using my referral link to purchase KKday products and tours. I will receive a commission to continue creating more travel content. Thank you.](https://www.kkday.com/zh-tw?cid=19365){:target="_blank"}
translations.Check-In 後就能先進去放行李，然後出來外面覓食。\n\n: After check-in, you can store your luggage first, then go outside to find food.
translations.JR 舞濱車站外面還有最後一家周邊專賣店可以買，最後又逛了一下，才依依不捨的離開: Outside JR Maihama Station, there is one last official merchandise store where we shopped a bit more before reluctantly leaving.
translations.KKday [*【東京和服租借推薦!】日本東京淺草|和服體驗(淺草首家日雜風和服: KKday [*【Tokyo Kimono Rental Recommendation!】Asakusa, Tokyo, Japan | Kimono Experience (Asakusa's First Japanese Magazine Style Kimono Shop, Only a 3-Minute Walk from Kaminarimon)*](https://www.kkday.com/zh-tw/product/140384?cid=19365&ud1=9da2c51fa4f2){:target="_blank"}
translations.Le Labo香水都是現場封裝跟貼標的(約需等 15–20 分鐘)，可以客製化自: Le Labo perfumes are packaged and labeled on-site (about 15–20 minutes), allowing you to customize your own label; 13 is my personal favorite, so I chose "ZhgChgLi," and 10 represents Tokyo. I asked the staff in broken English which one represents Japan, and he said ♨️ 😝.
translations.[**日本eSIM卡｜每日高速、總量、無限流量吃到飽方案**](https://: [**Japan eSIM Card｜Daily High-Speed, Total Data, Unlimited Data Plans**](https://www.kkday.com/zh-tw/product/137689-japan-high-speed-daily-unlimited-data-japanese-esim?cid=19365){:target="_blank"}

I will receive a commission to continue creating more travel content. Thank you.](https://www.kkday.com/zh-tw?cid=19365){:target="_blank"}
translations.[東京和服租借推薦!】日本東京淺草|和服體驗(淺草首家日雜風和服店家、距離雷門只: [Tokyo Kimono Rental Recommendation!】Tokyo Asakusa, Japan | Kimono Experience (Asakusa's First Japanese Style Kimono Shop, Only a 3-Minute Walk from Kaminarimon)](https://www.kkday.com/zh-tw/product/140384?cid=19365&ud1=9da2c51fa4f2){:target="_blank"}
translations.一人徒步在東京街頭看看風景，6 月還不會太熱，吹吹風很舒服。\n\n: Walking alone on the streets of Tokyo to enjoy the scenery. It's not too hot in June, and the breeze feels very pleasant.
translations.一出站正門就有烏龍派出所的人像：\n\n: Right outside the main station exit, there is a statue of a character from "Kochira Katsushika-ku Kameari Kōen-mae Hashutsujo" (Udon Police Station):
translations.一早出發，當天早上天氣陰雨綿綿。\n\n: Set off early in the morning, with continuous rain and overcast weather that day.
translations.一早睡飽後，才開始想今日行程(瘋狂 ENFP)，大家一起的只有晚上的晴空塔；早上: After a good night's sleep, I only started planning today's itinerary (typical crazy ENFP). The only plan with everyone was the Skytree at night; in the morning, my friends went to Akihabara, so it was a day for me to explore Tokyo alone.
translations.一樣上 KKDAY 買 5 天吃到飽的 SIM 卡約 $500。( [**日本e: Also bought a 5-day unlimited data SIM card on KKDAY for about $500. ([**Japan eSIM Card｜Daily High-Speed, Total Unlimited Data Plan**](https://www.kkday.com/zh-tw/product/137689-japan-high-speed-daily-unlimited-data-japanese-esim?cid=19365){:target="_blank"} **)**
translations.一路上很安靜舒服，日本司機都會等到客人坐好、起身下車才會啟動；一路晃晃悠悠到淺草: The ride was quiet and comfortable. Japanese drivers always wait until passengers are seated or have stood up to get off before starting the vehicle. We leisurely arrived at Senso-ji Temple.
translations.一路看風景，能看到晴空塔的時候就代表快到了。\n\n: Enjoying the scenery along the way, seeing the Skytree means you're almost there.
translations.一進來左手邊有行李房可以放行李，床位格局如下：\n\n: Upon entering, there is a luggage room on the left to store bags. The bed layout is as follows:
translations.一開始以為走錯走到人家辦公大樓，結果往裡面走就是飯店了。\n\n: At first, I thought I had entered the wrong building and walked into an office tower, but as I went further inside, I found the hotel.
translations.上公車時還出了烏龍，因為在京都搭是下車才收費，所以上車就呆呆地站著，又聽不懂日文: When boarding the bus, there was a mix-up because in Kyoto you pay when you get off. So I just stood there cluelessly when getting on, and since I couldn't understand Japanese, I only realized to tap my card at the front when a kind Japanese passenger said "pay pay."
translations.上面很黑、有點風，不能攜帶包包上去(有提供有鎖置物櫃)。\n\n: It is very dark and a bit windy up there. Bags are not allowed (there are locked lockers provided).
translations.下一站是自己從小看到大的龜有-烏龍派出所，想去看看長怎樣；在去的路上時先去表參道: The next stop is Kameari, where the long-running manga "Kochira Katsushika-ku Kameari Kōen-mae Hashutsujo" (Urong Police Station) is set—I wanted to see what it looks like. On the way there, I stopped by Le Labo in Omotesando to smell their scents again.
translations.不得不說很容易買瘋了，因為很多 40 週年限定；順便跟地球拍照。\n\n: I have to say it's easy to go crazy buying things because of many 40th anniversary limited editions; also took some photos with the Earth.
translations.不過我不怕吵，只要溫馨放鬆就能睡得很好；於是我一覺到天亮，直接睡到快 6 點才洗: However, I'm not afraid of noise; as long as it's cozy and relaxing, I can sleep well. So I slept until almost 6 a.m. before washing up and checking out (fully rested before traveling abroad).
translations.也搭了「 [迪士尼海洋渡輪航線](https://www.tokyodisney: We also took the [DisneySea Ferry Line](https://www.tokyodisneyresort.jp/tc/tds/attraction/detail/228/){:target="_blank"} and the [DisneySea Electric Railway](https://www.tokyodisneyresort.jp/tc/tds/attraction/detail/232/){:target="_blank"} because our feet were sore. It was nice to enjoy the scenery along the way; these are more like park transportation options without special ride effects.
translations.人很多，大概排了 100 多分鐘才排到：\n\n: There were many people, and we waited in line for about 100 minutes:
translations.以上沒有先買，到現場都是沒有空的位子可以進去的。\n\n: If you don't buy tickets in advance, there will be no available spots to enter on-site.
translations.但不得不說很壯觀，細節、動作跟聲音很精緻。\n\n: But I have to say it was spectacular, with detailed movements and refined sounds.
translations.你說為何不待在日本直接搭新幹線從大阪到東京？原因是東京行其實才是本來預期內安排的: You asked why not stay in Japan and take the Shinkansen directly from Osaka to Tokyo. The reason is that the Tokyo trip was the original planned overseas travel, while the Kyoto-Osaka-Kobe visit was just an extra side trip.
translations.個人覺得質感材質都蠻好的，還有可愛的米奇或米妮圖案(深紅色)可以選，而且不貴！！: I personally think the quality and material are quite good. There are also cute Mickey or Minnie designs (in dark red) to choose from, and they are affordable!
translations.免強拍了一張ＸＤ\n\n: Managed to take a shot XD
translations.入園後開始抽抽可以抽的表演或入場，但都沒中，最後我們購買晚上的表演煙火活動「 [: After entering the park, we tried to draw tickets for shows or entry but didn’t win any. Finally, we purchased front-row seats for the evening fireworks show "[Believe! ~Sea of Dreams~](https://www.tokyodisneyresort.jp/tc/tds/show/detail/967/){:target="_blank"}" (you can also watch from outside, as the show is in the harbor public area).
translations.內容是復刻電影地心歷險，場景跟沈浸很厲害；最後會有加速＆稍微地往下衝(失重感)，: The attraction recreates the movie Journey to the Center of the Earth, with impressive scenes and immersion. At the end, there is an acceleration and a slight drop (weightless feeling), providing a strong thrill without being too intense. It's suitable for those looking for a bit of excitement.
translations.其實我對 Le Labo 興趣不大，個人比較喜歡 Ormonde Jayne 的: Actually, I'm not very interested in Le Labo. I personally prefer Ormonde Jayne's perfumes, and Le Labo feels to me like a brand that sells packaging to the masses.
translations.再來是「 [翱翔：夢幻奇航的圖像](https://www.tokyodisne: Next is "[Soaring: Fantastic Flight Image](https://www.tokyodisneyresort.jp/tc/tds/attraction/detail/219/){:target="_blank"}", another popular attraction:
translations.再往前走一點到商場吃章魚燒跟台灣雞排？\n\n: Walk a little further to the mall to eat takoyaki and Taiwanese fried chicken?
translations.再往前走一點回頭一望就是在烏龍派出所裡被阿兩破壞很多次的富士電視台\n\n: Walk a bit further forward and look back to see Fuji TV, which was destroyed many times by Ataru in the series "Kochira Katsushika-ku Kameari Kōen-mae Hashutsujo."
translations.出來就是汐留站，可以直接去台場或新宿。\n\n: Exit here is Shiodome Station, from where you can go directly to Odaiba or Shinjuku.
translations.出來後又去旁邊的「 [海底兩萬哩](https://www.tokyodisne: Afterward, we went next door to "[20,000 Leagues Under the Sea](https://www.tokyodisneyresort.jp/tc/tds/attraction/detail/224/){:target="_blank"}" to relax a bit:
translations.出地鐵又走了一大段 (約 30 分鐘)才到明治神宮內。\n\n: After exiting the subway, we walked a long distance (about 30 minutes) to reach Meiji Shrine.
translations.出境之後時間也還很早，隨便吃個東西墊墊胃然後最後一逛免稅店。\n\n: After passing immigration, there was still plenty of time, so we grabbed a quick bite to fill our stomachs and did some last-minute shopping at the duty-free store.
translations.出境入關弄一弄大約 00:12 了，搭白牌計程車回台北差不多 01:30；洗個澡: After going through immigration and customs, it was about 00:12. Taking an unlicensed taxi back to Taipei took until around 01:30; took a shower and went straight to sleep, ending this trip.
translations.到機場時大約 5:30 還很早。\n\n: Arriving at the airport around 5:30 is still very early.
translations.到淺草寺後人還是一樣很多，拍拍照片就離開了。\n\n: After arriving at Senso-ji Temple, there were still many people, so we just took some photos and left.
translations.到達東京車站後再轉搭地鐵到新橋站，然後找路、走路到汐留。\n\n: After arriving at Tokyo Station, transfer to the subway to Shimbashi Station, then find your way and walk to Shiodome.
translations.到達第二航廈後直上三樓出境大廳，到達出境大廳後找到往 22–26 南側商場觀景台: After arriving at Terminal 2, go straight up to the third floor departure hall. Once in the departure hall, find the location of the 22–26 South Mall observation deck (facing the hall, walk all the way to the right).
translations.剛上去時還沒天黑，先隨手拍了幾張：\n\n: It was still not dark when we first arrived, so I casually took a few photos:
translations.劇場，球型巨幕＋4D 體驗(座椅會上升前進＋空氣味道)；內容是世界各地的風景，例: The theater features a spherical dome and 4D experience (seats rise and move forward + air scents); the content showcases landscapes from around the world, such as the scent of the grasslands during the prairie scenes. Very impressive and suitable for everyone!
translations.加上懶得改機票跟改住宿和不想有一週要 Work From Japan (覺得玩就: Added the hassle of changing flight tickets and accommodations, and not wanting to do a week of Work From Japan (believing that when you travel, you should purely enjoy it), so after finishing Kyoto, Osaka, and Kobe, we returned to Taiwan first.
translations.去 La Lebo 聞了一下東京專屬的 GAIAC 10 號味道\n\n: Went to La Lebo to smell the Tokyo-exclusive GAIAC No. 10 scent.
translations.去完東京鐵塔，看了下地圖決定下一站去明治神宮。\n\n: After visiting Tokyo Tower, we checked the map and decided to head to Meiji Shrine next.
translations.吃飽開始在園區繞繞逛逛紀念品店：\n\n: After eating, we started walking around the park and browsing souvenir shops:
translations.同 [上篇](../76d66c2e34af/) iPhone 一樣直接使用西瓜: Same as the [previous article](../76d66c2e34af/), I used a Suica card directly on my iPhone. My friend, who has an Android phone, could only buy the limited-time Welcome Suica card (asked at Narita Airport, and this was the only option left).
translations.回台灣後一直重複播的洗腦歌。\n\n: The catchy song that kept playing repeatedly after returning to Taiwan.
translations.回程直接從新橋去成田空港因為班次問題跟時間很充裕，搭的是都營淺草線機場快線，大約: For the return trip, we went directly from Shimbashi to Narita Airport. Due to schedule issues and plenty of time, we took the Toei Asakusa Line Airport Express, which took about 1 hour and 15 minutes; **however, you cannot use card or Suica to buy tickets, so we had to scramble to gather enough cash for three tickets and almost couldn't afford it**.
translations.回飯店後，繼續每日慣例；今天吃醬油泡麵、哈密瓜果肉果汁(好喝！！)、秋雅的梅酒(: After returning to the hotel, continued the daily routine; today had soy sauce instant noodles, melon juice (delicious!!), Akiya's plum wine (delicious!!), and oolong shochu (tasteless, not good).
translations.因此在出發前幾天決定前一天晚上就先去機場過夜，聽朋友說才知道原來桃園機場有膠囊旅: So a few days before departure, we decided to stay overnight at the airport the night before. A friend told me that Taoyuan Airport has a capsule hotel, so we gave it a try!
translations.因為不是鋼彈迷，因此我進場逛了一下看了幾場表演就先離開了。\n\n: Since I'm not a Gundam fan, I just browsed around and watched a few shows before leaving.
translations.因為在新宿的藥妝店遇到 Visa 刷不過只能付現金 $10,000 多買藥妝，還: Because my Visa card was declined at a drugstore in Shinjuku, I had to pay over ¥10,000 in cash for cosmetics and medicine. I also wanted to use up all my cash in the end.
translations.因為是三個人，格局是兩張床＋沙發上鋪床墊（實際睡起來跟床一樣）\n\n: Since there were three of us, the layout included two beds plus a mattress on the sofa's upper bunk (which felt just like a bed).
translations.因為時間還早，所以一樣用走的一路看風景過去。\n\n: Since it was still early, we walked and enjoyed the scenery along the way.
translations.因為這次只排 5 天，時間不多，因此機票優先選早去晚回；因為日期接近一樣直接上: Since this trip is only 5 days and time is limited, I prioritized flights with early departure and late return. Because the dates were close, I directly used [SkyScanner](https://www.skyscanner.com.tw/){:target="_blank"} to find flights with good times.
translations.在路邊遇到賣熱呼呼的烤蕃薯\n\n: Selling hot roasted sweet potatoes by the roadside
translations.坐完繼續逛逛吃吃：\n\n: After the ride, continue exploring and eating:
translations.基本上我就是把京阪神買的東西卸貨，把一些衣物用品拿出來，再重新整理放回行李箱就出: Basically, I just unpacked the things I bought in the Kyoto-Osaka-Kobe area, took out some clothes and supplies, then reorganized and packed them back into the suitcase before heading out.
translations.大概又走了快 1 小時回到東京車站一代(可以搭地鐵，但就一兩站；我喜歡在街頭走走: We walked for almost another hour to return to the Tokyo Station area (we could have taken the subway for just one or two stops, but I prefer walking around the streets to enjoy the scenery).
translations.大約需要 90–100 分鐘，排到剛好完全消化完了，不然太刺激XD\n\n: It takes about 90–100 minutes, just enough time to fully digest, otherwise it's too intense XD
translations.如前述，我們有加購一般席的觀賞位子。\n\n: As mentioned earlier, we purchased standard seating tickets.
translations.如果要去其他地點要走路到新橋站(大約 10 分鐘)，從新橋過到東京車站大約也是再: If you want to go to other places, you need to walk to Shimbashi Station (about 10 minutes). From Shimbashi to Tokyo Station is also about 10 minutes (1–2 stops away).
translations.對沒去過的地方，我依然是 ENFP 隨性派，覺得去哪裡都很新鮮；所以主要只負責大: For places I haven't been to, I remain an ENFP free spirit and find everything fresh and exciting. So, I mainly handle the big picture like flights, accommodation, and transportation. As for attractions, I decide based on where my travel companions want to go or how we feel at the moment.
translations.導覽有類似昨天迪士尼會動的壁畫ＸＤ兩位前人在對話，內容那略是要蓋一棟日本有標誌性: The guide showed murals similar to the animated ones at Disneyland yesterday XD Two predecessors were having a conversation about building a symbolic Japanese structure. The same architect also designed the Tsutenkaku Tower in Osaka.
translations.就只是一般的公園QQ，很多小孩在裡面踢球就這樣，公園椅子有一個阿兩的坐姿人像，被: It's just an ordinary park QQ, with many kids playing soccer inside. There was a statue of a person sitting in the style of A-Liang on a park bench, but it was covered with many kids' bags and belongings, so I didn't take a photo.
translations.幸運的是中午後就沒下啦！！我不是雨男！！\n\n: Fortunately, the rain stopped after noon!! I'm not a rain guy!!
translations.床墊除了厚之外也夠長，176 CM 睡起來沒什麼問題；環境乾淨、燈光溫馨、冷氣很: The mattress is not only thick but also long enough; at 176 CM, sleeping was comfortable. The environment is clean, the lighting is warm, and the air conditioning is very comfortable. The only unavoidable issue is that snoring from others can still be heard. (Therefore, free earplugs are provided at the entrance.)
translations.店員幫忙 Set 好時的熟度約只有 1 分，要自己夾起來放到鐵板煎到自己喜好的熟: The staff sets the doneness to about rare (level 1), so you need to pick it up yourself and cook it on the iron plate to your preferred doneness.
translations.很可愛但很甜的米奇冰棒，還有安娜貝爾(玲娜貝爾)。\n\n: A very cute but very sweet Mickey popsicle, and also Annabelle (Rinabelle).
translations.很可愛的抱哥玩偶！！\n\n: A very cute Hug Brother plush toy!!
translations.很多可愛的周邊要控制好自己的手(剁手手)！\n\n: So many cute souvenirs, gotta control my hands (hand chopping)!
translations.很熱很擠，但還是到登機口了：\n\n: It was hot and crowded, but we still made it to the boarding gate:
translations.後來搭上兩點出的成田特快往東京車站。\n\n: Later, we took the 2 PM Narita Express to Tokyo Station.
translations.後來還發現松山飛羽田沒貴多少還比較方便 Orz。\n\n: Later, I found that flying from Songshan to Haneda wasn't much more expensive and was more convenient. Orz.
translations.後面來看，還好有回來；因為回台灣的那週日本遇到超強颱風，淹水、新幹線停駛、車站塞: Looking back, I'm glad we returned; because the week we went back to Taiwan, Japan was hit by a super typhoon causing floods, Shinkansen suspensions, and crowded stations. If we had stayed in Japan that week, there probably wouldn't have been many places to visit. (Finally, not the 🌧️ rain god anymore!)
translations.從下機到入境大廳大概要走個 15 分鐘，再到提領行李實際出關入境大約已經下午 1: It takes about 15 minutes to walk from the plane to the arrival hall. By the time you pick up your luggage and clear immigration, it’s usually around 1 PM.
translations.快走到東京鐵塔時經過一個公園「Tokyo Metropolitan Shiba: When walking quickly to Tokyo Tower, I passed through a park called "Tokyo Metropolitan Shiba Park⁩." Viewing the tower through the branches here offers a unique charm:
translations.想到昨天在晴空塔扭蛋機看到日本代表地標有一個國會議事堂沒看過，就先朝這邊去。\n: Thinking about the Japanese landmark of the National Diet Building I saw in the gashapon machine at Tokyo Skytree yesterday but haven't visited, I decided to head there first.
translations.感謝這次的旅伴， Sean INFJ/James ISTJ 規劃大神；Sean: Thanks to my travel companions this time, Sean INFJ and James ISTJ, the planning masters; Sean took charge of deciding how to play Disney, which rides to go first, and which fast passes are more worthwhile.
translations.我 & 當前同事 (Sean) & 前前同事 ( [James Lin](htt: Me & current colleague (Sean) & former colleague ( [James Lin](https://medium.com/u/cbe4c8255367){:target="_blank"} ); Sean & James were college classmates. (Yes, the industry is really that small XD)
translations.我們訂的時候就只剩單人床位了。\n\n: When we booked, only single beds were left.
translations.我們買的是海洋，沒買陸地， **那個漂亮的城堡陸地才有；海洋的入口要再搭園內的電: We bought tickets for DisneySea, not Disneyland. **That beautiful castle is only in Disneyland; the entrance to DisneySea requires taking the park’s internal train.**
translations.我點的是神戶牛漢堡肉＋神戶牛排＋湯飯冰淇淋的套餐組合 ($3,355 日圓)：\: I ordered the set meal with Kobe beef hamburger steak, Kobe beef steak, and soup rice with ice cream (¥3,355):
translations.房間內禁止飲食，我們這次入住每人送一個茶包可以請櫃檯幫忙泡，坐在門口吧台喝，現場: No eating or drinking is allowed in the room. Each of us received a tea bag upon check-in, and the front desk can help brew it. You can sit at the bar by the entrance to drink. Filling out a membership form on-site gives you a free towel.
translations.房間有雙人房、三人房、四人房、跟單人床位 (大概有 16 個床位一間)\n\n: The rooms include double rooms, triple rooms, quadruple rooms, and single beds (about 16 beds per room).
translations.手扶梯一上來就會看到很有台灣風格的旅館門口\n\n: As soon as you get off the escalator, you'll see a hotel entrance with a strong Taiwanese style.
translations.抵達台場後先來看台場的自由女神。\n\n: After arriving at Odaiba, we first went to see the Statue of Liberty in Odaiba.
translations.拿著食物出來剛好港灣表演活動「 [眾彩同慶](https://www.tokyo: Holding the food, the harbor show "[Colorful Celebration](https://www.tokyodisneyresort.jp/tc/tds/show/detail/7600/){:target="_blank"}" just started:
translations.排隊入場後在遊戲開始之前會有場景開始帶入，探險家的故事，掛在牆上的畫，其實是高解: After queuing for entry, before the game starts, there is a scene introduction featuring the explorer's story. The paintings hanging on the walls are actually high-resolution screens with animations and voiceovers, creating an impressive effect!
translations.排隊品嘗有名的極味屋，大約 5 點半左右到，排差不多 45 分鐘就有位子了。\n: Queued to taste the famous Gokumiya, arrived around 5:30 PM, waited about 45 minutes to get a seat.
translations.接近表演開演時間後開始走回港灣，入場席地而坐。\n\n: Started walking back to the harbor close to the showtime and sat on the ground to enter.
translations.改前往台場，從汐留出發到台場的電車很酷，一路上可以看到富士電視台跟整個台場的景觀: Changing to head to Odaiba, the train from Shiodome to Odaiba is very cool, offering views of Fuji TV and the entire Odaiba area along the way.
translations.放行李、休息一下：\n\n: Drop off luggage and take a break:
translations.整場表演陳進體驗感很強，包含音樂、投影(後面火山會爆炸！)、雷射、煙火、迪士尼海: The entire show offers a strong immersive experience, including music, projections (the volcano erupts at the back!), lasers, fireworks, and DisneySea character storylines... all well integrated. It's definitely worth staying until the evening to watch the full performance to get your money's worth.
translations.整天的迪士尼體驗下來的心得是，所有設施都很有沈浸感，不是單純的遊樂設施，而是希望: The whole day at Disney felt very immersive. The attractions are not just rides but aim to let visitors fully engage with the characters and settings. Although it's less thrilling than Universal, it's definitely very fun. Be sure to watch the fireworks show at night!
translations.新橋離開前一隅。\n\n: A corner of Shinbashi before leaving.
translations.旁邊還有蛋頭先生的互動劇場表演跟小的紀念品店：\n\n: Next to it, there is an interactive show featuring Mr. Potato Head and a small souvenir shop:
translations.日幣真的要留至少 1 萬上下在身上，避免遇到不能刷卡或不能刷 Vias 卡的狀況: You really need to carry at least around 10,000 yen in cash to avoid situations where cards or Vias cards are not accepted.
translations.日本 Le Labo 價格如上，加上免稅最後 13 再少 $1,000 日圓。\: The prices for Le Labo in Japan are as above. With tax exemption, the final price is 13,000 yen minus 1,000 yen.
translations.日本今天開始天氣也不好了，沒想到每天經過的汐留就能看到東京鐵塔、還有特別的裝置藝: The weather in Japan started to turn bad today. Unexpectedly, I could see Tokyo Tower and some special installation art every day passing by Shiodome, but I only stopped to appreciate it on the last day.
translations.日本入境資訊、其他資訊心得分享請參考 [**前一篇**](../76d66c2e: For information on Japan entry and other insights, please refer to [**previous article**](../76d66c2e34af/) .
translations.日本天氣狀況很不好，一路搖搖晃晃(死魚眼)，比迪士尼的遊樂設施還刺激，一度停止共: The weather in Japan was very bad, making the journey quite shaky (dead fish eyes), more thrilling than the rides at Disneyland. We even had to stop dining together for a while; fortunately, we arrived safely back in Taiwan.
translations.日本時間表示法是 30小時制，25:00 代表凌晨 01:00 很酷\n: Japanese time notation uses a 30-hour system; for example, 25:00 means 1:00 AM, which is pretty cool.
translations.日本相關文化心得請參考上篇「 [[遊記] 2023 京阪神 & 🇯🇵初次著陸](: For insights on Japanese culture, please refer to the previous article "[[Travelogue] 2023 Keihanshin & 🇯🇵 First Landing](../76d66c2e34af/)".
translations.日落後，可以鳥瞰整個東京的夜景，很美：\n\n: After sunset, you can overlook the entire Tokyo night view, which is very beautiful:
translations.早上鳥瞰東京景觀也不錯，第三張遠方就是晚上要去的晴空塔。\n\n: The morning bird's-eye view of Tokyo is also nice. In the third photo, you can see the Skytree in the distance, where we will go in the evening.
translations.早知道就在膠囊旅館睡到 7 點再下來了！\n\n: I should have just stayed in the capsule hotel until 7 AM before coming down!
translations.是紐約的自由女神的1/7， 象徵日法的友好關係。\n\n: It is one-seventh the size of New York's Statue of Liberty, symbolizing the friendship between Japan and France.
translations.時間允許的話要兩天陸+海，海的沒有夢幻城堡跟陸地上的遊行QQ\n\n: If time allows, spend two days on land and sea. The sea park doesn't have the Fantasy Castle or land parades QQ.
translations.時間接近傍晚時，開始大買特買跟拍照：\n\n: As evening approached, we started shopping extensively and taking photos:
translations.晴空塔我們沒買到 Top Deck，只買到中間景觀，7點入場。\n\n: We didn't get tickets for the Top Deck of the Skytree, only the middle observation deck. Entry was at 7 PM.
translations.最後一晚吃吃居酒屋、拍拍路上的夜景記錄：\n\n: On the last night, we dined at an izakaya and took photos of the night scenery along the way:
translations.最後一餐吃天婦羅蕎麥麵。\n\n: The last meal was tempura soba.
translations.最後只去百貨公司買買衣服褲子跟藥妝，天氣開始陰雨就折返回飯店了。\n\n: Finally, we just went to the department store to buy some clothes, pants, and cosmetics. When the weather turned rainy and cloudy, we returned to the hotel.
translations.最後在本殿完成參拜就離開了\n\n: Finally, we completed our worship at the main hall and then left.
translations.最後附上免費的登頂成功紀念照！\n\n: Finally, here is the free commemorative photo of the summit success!
translations.最慘的是入口的阿兩扭蛋機，阿兩人像的眼睛破掉也沒修，整個很淒涼；最後扭了一個熱褲: The worst was the Ah Liang gashapon machine at the entrance. The eyes of the Ah Liang figure were broken and never fixed, making it look very sad. In the end, I got a hot-pants cop and left feeling disappointed.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.本來以為早上 8 點會人擠人但運氣很好幾乎沒人\n\n: I originally thought it would be crowded at 8 AM, but luckily there were hardly any people.
translations.本來打算去台場的百貨公司買買衣服鞋子，但快到的時候撇見地鐵能到新宿；就突然拐個彎: Originally planned to shop for clothes and shoes at the shopping mall in Odaiba, but near arrival, I noticed the subway could take me to Shinjuku; so I suddenly changed direction and headed to Shinjuku.
translations.東京專屬的 Gaiac 10 比較貴，免稅後還要 $16,800 日圓。\n\n: The Tokyo-exclusive Gaiac 10 is more expensive, costing ¥16,800 after tax exemption.
translations.查網路附近的 Ario 百貨公司有烏龍派出所的場景跟樂園，於事繼續走去(約 10: Checked online and found that the nearby Ario department store has scenes and a park from the "Kochira Katsushika-ku Kameari Kōen-mae Hashutsujo" (Udon Police) series, so we continued walking there (about 10 minutes):
translations.樂，主要由 Sean & James Handle 了一切，我們有計劃需要先買票: Fun was mainly handled by Sean & James. We planned to buy tickets in advance for Disneyland (Sea), Yokohama Gundam, and Shibuya Sky; so we purchased the tickets two weeks before departure.
translations.機捷預辦登機目前還不能辦理隔日航班，因此只能提著行李箱大包小包的去第二航廈。\n: The Taoyuan Airport MRT pre-check-in currently does not support next-day flights, so you have to carry your luggage to Terminal 2.
translations.此時也接近中午，在東京車站內亂逛；只是證明一下自己不會迷路，但很懶得排有名的伴手: It was nearly noon, so we wandered around Tokyo Station; just to prove we wouldn't get lost, but we were too lazy to line up at the famous souvenir shops.
translations.每個床位都有獨立的鏡子、書桌、燈、窗簾、垃圾桶；我睡的是上鋪，床墊很厚不怕因為動: Each bed has its own mirror, desk, lamp, curtain, and trash bin; I slept on the top bunk, and the mattress was thick, so I didn't worry about disturbing the person below when moving around.
translations.比較特別的事是剛好遇到日本傳統婚禮，在旁參觀：\n\n: A special moment was accidentally witnessing a traditional Japanese wedding nearby:
translations.沒什麼人，內容是仿造的潛水艇下水探索的感覺(但應該是模擬)，刺激性很低，只適合小: Not many people. The content simulates the feeling of a submarine launch and exploration (but it’s probably a simulation). It’s not very thrilling and only suitable for young children.
translations.沒有地心探險之旅刺激(不會失重往下衝、也沒那麼快)，內容是電影印第安納瓊斯的沈浸: Not as thrilling as a journey to the center of the earth (no weightlessness or fast drops), the attraction features immersive scenes from the Indiana Jones movies. I personally found it fun and enjoyable.
translations.消化的差不多後開始排「 [地心探險之旅](https://www.tokyodi: After digesting, we started planning the "[Journey to the Center of the Earth](https://www.tokyodisneyresort.jp/tc/tds/attraction/detail/223/){:target="_blank"}":
translations.淺草寺遠眺晴空塔。\n\n: View of Tokyo Skytree from Asakusa Temple.
translations.熱狗好吃、水果酒好喝！\n\n: Hot dogs are delicious, and fruit wine is tasty!
translations.獺祭跟我在東京車站買價格差不多。\n\n: Dassai is priced similarly to what I bought at Tokyo Station.
translations.玩完這兩個設施之後接近中午時分，開始覓食，因為餐廳都滿了就只能找小吃類的食物，我: After enjoying these two attractions and nearing noon, we started looking for food. Since the restaurants were full, we could only find snacks. We casually ate pizza, chicken legs, and so on.
translations.發現要買獺祭或常見伴手禮(白色戀人、香蕉蛋糕…)這裡什麼都有，在這裡買就好了ＸＤ: I found that if you want to buy Dassai sake or common souvenirs (Shiroi Koibito, banana cake, etc.), they have everything here. Just buy them here XD
translations.皇居真的很大，光從最外面走道入口就大概花了快 30 分鐘。\n\n: The Imperial Palace is really huge; just walking from the outermost entrance took nearly 30 minutes.
translations.看了地圖，新橋離東京鐵塔不遠；就決定先去那兒了。\n\n: Looking at the map, Shinbashi is not far from Tokyo Tower; so we decided to go there first.
translations.看地圖先跑去後站的龜有公園逛逛：\n\n: Check the map and first head to Kameari Park near the back exit:
translations.看地圖搭公車到淺草比較近，查路線＆走到公車站大概花了 15 分鐘：\n\n: Taking the bus to Asakusa is closer according to the map. It took about 15 minutes to check the route and walk to the bus stop:
translations.神戶牛排超好吃，汁多裡嫩，沒有任何牛騷味🤩；漢堡肉也不錯，但比較膩一點。\n\n: Kobe beef steak was super delicious, juicy and tender inside, with no beefy smell 🤩; the hamburger steak was also good but a bit greasier.
translations.章魚燒普，太多顆很膩；雞排蠻特別的，雖然寫台灣唐揚，不過實際是日式雞排(薄、無骨: Takoyaki was average and too many pieces felt greasy; the chicken cutlet was quite unique. Although labeled as Taiwanese karaage, it was actually a Japanese-style cutlet (thin, boneless) fried with Taiwanese batter, different from typical Taiwanese chicken cutlets. Still, I told the staff it was delicious and that I’m Taiwanese 🤣.
translations.第一張圖左上角就是遠方的東京鐵塔；裡面很暗、玻璃會反光不太好自拍人像。\n\n: The Tokyo Tower can be seen in the upper left corner of the first photo in the distance; the interior is quite dark, and the glass causes reflections, making it difficult to take good selfies.
translations.第二天一早趕 10 點鋼彈表演，先搭電車到櫻木町站再轉搭纜車＋走路到鋼彈工廠。\: Early on the second day, we rushed to catch the 10 AM Gundam show. We first took the train to Sakuragicho Station, then transferred to the cable car and walked to the Gundam Factory.
translations.約莫下午 4 點多回飯店拿行李，開始慢慢移動到成田機場。\n\n: Around 4 PM, we returned to the hotel to pick up our luggage and slowly made our way to Narita Airport.
translations.經過國會議事堂看大門緊閉就沒進去了(好像可以從側門進去參觀?)：\n\n: Passing by the National Diet Building, we saw the main gate was closed, so we didn't go in (it seems you can enter for a tour through the side gate?):
translations.繼上一篇「 [**[遊記] 2023 京阪神 & 🇯🇵初次著陸**](../76: Following the previous article "[**[Travelogue] 2023 Kyoto-Osaka-Kobe & 🇯🇵 First Landing**](../76d66c2e34af/)," I quickly returned to Japan just one week later.
translations.繼上個月京阪神後，2023/06 東京 5 日自由行紀錄及食住行資訊\n\n: Following last month's trip to Kyoto-Osaka-Kobe, 2023/06 Tokyo 5-Day Free Travel Record and Food, Accommodation, and Transportation Information
translations.繼續往內淺草寺走，觀光客實在太多了，本來沒打算買任何東西，就只是走來看看；途中吃: Continue walking deeper into Senso-ji Temple; there were so many tourists. I originally didn't plan to buy anything, just wanted to take a look. Along the way, I tried this bean shop, and it was surprisingly delicious, so I bought some as souvenirs.
translations.繼續走走拍拍，園區真的很大，單純拍一些造景，動畫類夢幻場景都沒拍：\n\n: Keep walking and taking photos. The park is really big. I only took pictures of some scenery and didn’t capture any of the animated or fantasy scenes:
translations.繼續走過個山腳路，就到東京鐵塔下了。\n\n: Continuing along the footpath, we arrived at the base of Tokyo Tower.
translations.聞了一輪買了 Another 13，味道夠濃；還有不免俗跟風買了東京專屬的 Ga: After sampling several, I bought Another 13, which has a strong scent; I also followed the trend and bought the Tokyo-exclusive Gaiac 10, both in 15ml as souvenirs.
translations.衛浴設施很新很乾淨舒服，馬桶有兩個、淋浴間有五間、有兩隻吹風機(1 隻 Dyso: The bathroom facilities are very new, clean, and comfortable. There are two toilets, five shower rooms, two hairdryers (one is a Dyson), and provided body wash and shampoo. You only need to bring your own towel and toiletries.
translations.裡面還有周邊專賣店，賣鋼彈模型跟獨家商品。\n\n: There are also nearby specialty stores selling Gundam models and exclusive merchandise.
translations.覺得很淡…木質調…聞不太出來。(但 Day 4 還是下手了)\n\n: It feels very light… woody tone… hard to smell it clearly. (But I still went for it on Day 4)
translations.覺得明治神宮比較莊重嚴肅，後面去淺草寺覺得觀光客太多很雜。\n\n: I found Meiji Shrine to be more solemn and serious, while later at Senso-ji Temple, there were too many tourists, making it feel very crowded.
translations.觀光客真的超級超級多啊！！有夠擠，只能找角度拍了。\n\n: There are really, really many tourists!! It's so crowded, I could only find angles to take photos.
translations.說歸說東京行才是預期出國安排內，但我們也一直只停留在嘴上説說；直到我京阪神那邊都: Although we always said the Tokyo trip was our planned overseas trip, it remained just talk; only after our Kansai trip was mostly confirmed did we start planning and actually executing the Tokyo itinerary.
translations.豆皮泡麵好好吃。\n\n: Tofu skin instant noodles are really delicious.
translations.買完就繼續往龜有搭（龜有真的蠻遠的）。\n\n: After buying, continue on to Kameari (Kameari is really quite far).
translations.買完雨衣就直衝「 [玩具總動員瘋狂遊戲屋](https://www.tokyod: After buying raincoats, we headed straight to the [Toy Story Mania!](https://www.tokyodisneyresort.jp/tc/tds/attraction/detail/218/){:target="_blank"}:
translations.走出門發現地鐵有事故嚴重誤點，看 Google Map 距離不遠，就改用走的了(: Stepping outside, I found that the subway had a serious delay due to an accident. Checking Google Maps, the distance wasn't far, so I decided to walk instead (about 20 minutes):
translations.走到公車站的路上幾乎都沒人、也沒觀光客，公車站路線 Google 連翻譯也沒；真: On the way to the bus stop, there were almost no people or tourists. The bus route at the stop isn't even translated on Google; we've truly arrived in a non-tourist area.
translations.走到天守台之後就離開了，當天皇居內也沒有開放參觀。\n\n: After reaching Tenshudai, we left as the Imperial Palace was not open for visits that day.
translations.走到底後又去搭了「 [印第安納瓊斯冒險旅程：水晶骷髏頭魔宮](https://w: At the end, we also took the "[Indiana Jones Adventure: Temple of the Crystal Skull](https://www.tokyodisneyresort.jp/tc/tds/attraction/detail/222/){:target="_blank"}":
translations.走到底看到手扶梯往上走\n\n: Walk straight to the end and take the escalator up.
translations.走到晴空塔後，先在裡面的商場逛逛，點了杯北海道草莓冰淇淋休息一下。\n\n: After arriving at Tokyo Skytree, we first strolled around the mall inside and ordered a cup of Hokkaido strawberry ice cream to take a break.
translations.起床後去寄放行李，同 Day 4 獨自隨性看感覺探索東京，因為是晚上的飛機，還有: After waking up, I went to store my luggage. Like on Day 4, I explored Tokyo casually on my own. Since the flight was at night, I still had most of the day to wander around. The weather was cloudy and rainy.
translations.越走越近，越來越大。\n\n: Getting closer and closer, growing bigger and bigger.
translations.趣事之一是在路上遇到日本極端主義的抗議：\n\n: One interesting event was encountering an extremist protest in Japan on the street:
translations.轉搭成田特快的時候一開始犯蠢，直接刷 西瓜卡進站；結果整班特快都是指定席，只能回: When transferring to the Narita Express, I made a silly mistake at first by tapping my Suica card to enter the station. However, the entire train requires reserved seats, so I had to exit the station, buy a ticket, and enter again (later I found out you can apparently buy tickets directly from the platform machines inside the station).
translations.這個十字路口一定要來朝聖一下，想到今際之國的闖關者。\n\n: You must visit this intersection to pay homage; it reminds me of the challengers in "Alice in Borderland."
translations.這時時間也接近傍晚，開始慢慢的往晴空塔移動。\n\n: At this time, it was nearing evening, and we slowly started moving towards the Tokyo Skytree.
translations.這次出行比較特別的是因為是一早 8 點的飛機，我們又都從台北出發；抓 6 點到機: This trip was special because we had an 8 AM flight, and all of us were departing from Taipei; planning to arrive at the airport by 6 AM meant leaving home around 4–5 AM. Plus, the excitement and nervousness about the trip made it hard to fall asleep, so we barely got any rest.
translations.這次只去東京，因此就找一間能住四天不用換的；因為時間接近，東京連鎖的 東橫 In: This time we only went to Tokyo, so we looked for a hotel to stay for four days without changing. Since it was close to the date, all Tokyo chain hotels like Toyoko Inn or APA were fully booked. We had to use [Agoda](https://www.agoda.com){:target="_blank"} to find a hotel near the center of Tokyo with access to train or subway stations.
translations.這次我家上次剩的，帶了 $60,000 日幣，最後只剩 $5,00 上下。\n\: This time I brought the leftover 60,000 yen from last trip, and ended up with about 5,000 yen left.
translations.這次遇到的登機口要搭接駁車(大陸網友稱擺渡車)\n\n: This time, the boarding gate required taking a shuttle bus (called a "ferry bus" by mainland Chinese netizens).
translations.這邊我們是買快速通關。\n\n: Here we bought the Express Pass.
translations.這邊犯了個錯， **就是不應該一個人刷三張機票** ，要自己買自己的，因信用卡刷: Here I made a mistake: **you should never book three tickets under one person's name**. Everyone should buy their own ticket because credit card purchases include travel insurance.
translations.這邊要注意要使用兩雙筷子；因衛生，鐵的用來煎、竹的用來吃，交替使用。\n\n: Here, be sure to use two pairs of chopsticks; for hygiene, use the metal ones for cooking and the bamboo ones for eating, alternating between them.
translations.進入鐵塔後買了 Top Deck 門票；除了可以上到鐵塔最頂端還包含導覽(有中文: After entering the tower, we bought Top Deck tickets; besides reaching the very top of the tower, it includes a guided tour (with Chinese audio) and comes with a souvenir photo! (Great experience)
translations.進去後心態崩了，幾乎可以確定歸有已經不維護烏龍派出所這個 IP (年輕人都不看了: After entering, my mindset collapsed. It's almost certain that the creators no longer maintain the KochiKame IP (young people don't watch it anymore...). Aside from the statue of the character outside the station, from the daily park in front to the so-called KochiKame theme park, only the sets remain. Beyond the sets, the area has been converted into an amusement park with claw machines.
translations.遊戲內容是 2 人一組(1 人就跟人機)操作按鈕射投影氣球得分，趣味性高，刺激性: The game involves two players per team (a single player can play with the AI), pressing buttons to shoot projected balloons for points. It is highly fun and low in intensity, making it ideal for couples or families.
translations.遠遠的拍一張到此一遊照，就往下往皇居走了。\n\n: Took a quick photo from afar as a souvenir, then headed down towards the Imperial Palace.
translations.還好 Sean 有提早買票，現場才買根本進不去。\n\n: Luckily, Sean bought the tickets early; buying them on-site would have meant no entry at all.
translations.還好我們前一晚有預定，遇到有其他旅客想現場入住，已經沒位子了。\n\n: Fortunately, we had booked the night before. When other travelers wanted to check in on-site, there were no rooms left.
translations.還是日清泡麵好吃加上超商炸雞🤤！前幾天買哈密瓜的果肉果汁，今天買草莓的，一樣好喝: Nissin instant noodles are still the best, especially with convenience store fried chicken 🤤! A few days ago, I bought muskmelon juice with pulp, and today I got strawberry juice—just as good. I don’t remember much about the sake; these two are probably just average.
translations.還算方便並且價格合理、評價 OK，實際住下來除了乾淨舒服，房間內也不會太小。\n: It's quite convenient and reasonably priced with decent reviews. In reality, the stay was clean and comfortable, and the room was not too small.
translations.酒吧應該要另外訂位，開放時間同參觀時間。\n\n: Reservations for the bar should be made separately. The opening hours are the same as the visiting hours.
translations.鋼彈表演一路從 10 點到中午，不同場次有不同劇情；但因為我不是鋼彈迷所以只是跟: The Gundam show runs from 10 AM until noon, with different storylines for each session; however, since I'm not a Gundam fan, I just tagged along for a quick look.
translations.門口有耳塞可以免費索取。\n\n: Earplugs are available at the entrance for free.
translations.開始逛街走走看看\n\n: Start walking around and exploring the shops
translations.開著宣傳車在國會議事堂附近大聲廣報，被警察攔下來後警察拆除他的廣播器；後來又加速: Driving a promotional vehicle loudly near the National Diet Building, he was stopped by the police who removed his loudspeaker; later, he sped through a red light to escape. With police everywhere, it was a bit scary.
translations.除了角落有一家酒吧之外沒有其他設施、光害，拍照跟看夜景很漂亮。\n\n: Besides a bar in the corner, there are no other facilities or light pollution. The view is great for photography and night sightseeing.
translations.離開前最後回眸一拍。\n\n: A final glance back before leaving.
translations.雨越來越大，於是先去路邊商店買米奇雨衣：\n\n: The rain got heavier, so we first went to a roadside shop to buy Mickey raincoats:
translations.順手去賣酒的商鋪帶一大一小清酒回台灣，店員還是台灣人。\n\n: Stopped by a liquor store and bought one large and one small sake to bring back to Taiwan; the clerk was also Taiwanese.
translations.食物方面都亂吃，覺得從外面帶自己的食物進來應該比較好。\n\n: As for food, we ate randomly and felt it might be better to bring our own food from outside.
translations.飯店藏身在辦公大樓內，很特別：\n\n: The hotel is hidden inside an office building, which is quite unique:
